item.title: Resolve financial disputes peacefully: Delhi HC to Sunjay Kapur's family
item.description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday asked the mother, wife and family members of late industrialist Sunjay Kapur to "peacefully" resolve their differences...

item.title: Govt directs platforms to label AI content, deploy checks on misuse
item.description: Platforms must also ensure that AI-generated material is clearly labelled and carries identifiers indicating its synthetic origin

item.title: Bangladesh heads to polls on Feb 12: Why the outcome matters for India
item.description: Bangladesh votes on February 12 in its first election since the fall of the Sheikh Hasina government; the outcome could shape political stability and ...

item.title: UP Board Class 12th practical exams 2026 deadline extended to February 13
item.description: Uttar Pradesh Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad has revised dates for UP Board Intermediate practical exams 2026. The board has decided to extend both phases...

item.title: Citi appoints Ankur Khurana as head of commercial banking in India
item.description: Ankur Khurana has been appointed head of Citi's commercial banking operations in India and will be responsible for driving strategy, growth and perfor...
